hero.title: The taste of a true New York deli in Toulouse
hero.subtitle: Signature sandwiches, fine charcuterie, and carefully sourced grocery products.

cards.title: Sandwiches & Pastrami
cards.description: Our New York classics made to order with carefully chosen breads and house-made sauces.

cards.title: Charcuterie & Cheeses
cards.description: Boards to share, blending bold French products with the spirit of a neighborhood deli.

cards.title: Wines & Beers
cards.description: Independent bottles and craft beers for takeaway, pairing, or enjoying in the deli.

aboutTeaser.title: A story of neighborhood and flavor
aboutTeaser.paragraphOne: Mow's Deli was built to combine New York deli energy with the warmth of Toulouse.
aboutTeaser.paragraphTwo: Our team serves honest plates, curates lively grocery shelves, and welcomes everyone like a local.

items.quote: The sandwiches are incredible, and the welcome makes you want to come back every week.
items.name: Camille R.

items.quote: A true neighborhood deli atmosphere, with a sharp and thoughtful bottle selection.
items.name: Julien M.

items.quote: Excellent products, warm service, already a must-visit address in Toulouse.
items.name: Sarah D.

menu.pageSubtitle: Explore our signature sandwiches, charcuterie and cheese boards, and a curated bottle selection.
